STRAW HAT PEPES
Hover each pepe to reveal their nakama story — click to customize
DEMON OF THE BLADE
Three swords, zero chill. Got lost on his way to becoming the world's greatest swordsman — but always ends up where he's needed. The Pepe in him refuses to lose.
THREE SWORD STYLE
ZORO PEPESwordsman · First Mate
CHEF OF THE SEAS
Blond, elegant, kicks harder than a freight train. Cooks with passion of a thousand hearts, fights with the fury of one. Lights a cigarette: No problem.
BLACK LEG STYLE
SANJI PEPECook · Black Leg
COTTON CANDY MEDIC
A reindeer who ate the Human-Human Fruit and became the crew's doctor. Cries when called cute. Loves cotton candy. Rampages when needed.
RUMBLE BALL
CHOPPER PEPEDoctor · Reindeer
SNIPER KING
Liar. Coward. God. The greatest sniper on the seas who lied about being brave until he became brave. His nose grows with each impossible shot.
KING OF SNIPERS
USOPP PEPESniper · God Usopp
KING OF THE SEAS
Ate the Gum-Gum Fruit, stretches reality itself. Doesn't want gold — wants freedom. Says I'm gonna be King of the Pirates with the dumbest smile — and you believe him.
GEAR FIFTH
LUFFY PEPECaptain · King of Pirates
